description_long: This is a modern, flat-roofed house set within a fenced rectangular lot featuring a mix of geometric volumes and clean lines. The exterior combines light wood paneling with dark gray and white surfaces, creating a striking contrast. The property includes a spacious driveway leading to a two-car garage, a central courtyard with a swimming pool, and landscaped areas with clusters of trees and shrubs. Large windows and glass doors are distributed asymmetrically, maximizing natural light and views of the garden. The house has two visible stories, with the upper level forming a partial block above the main structure. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, two-story house with flat roofs, wood and dark gray paneling, a garage, pool, and landscaped yard within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, two-car garage, and landscaped front yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the swimming pool, patio area, and the back facade with large windows and garden landscaping.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the garage, upper story block, and a mix of wood and dark gray exterior surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, secondary building volume, and additional landscaping near the fence.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a single door, small steps, and a minimalist overhang, flanked by vertical windows and landscaping.
